§ What you get three plans / five things each

Five things, per plan.

We get the question a lot. So here it is, plain. Audit is the one-time diagnosis. Signal is the ongoing AI visibility system. Amplify is Signal plus a content production engine that turns dashboard insight into shipped pages.

§00 / Start hereOne-time

Audit

Before you hire anyone, see what's broken.

$500once · 48-hour delivery
  1. 01
    See where AI is recommending you and your competitors. We run real queries against ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude in your industry and show you exactly which businesses get cited. We also break out Reddit specifically — AI engines lean on reddit.com threads constantly when answering "best X for Y" questions, and the dashboard shows which subreddits your competitors get mentioned in and which they don't, so you know exactly where to engage. Not Copilot, not Brave, not You.com. We track the engines that move the needle and skip the ones that don't — if Copilot ever starts driving real referrals for your business, we'll add it then.
  2. 02
    Keyword gap analysis built for AEO, not classic SEO. The queries your competitors get cited for that you don't, with the competitor names attached and grouped by intent.
  3. 03
    Technical and schema audit specific to AI citation. Your structured data, content shape, and entity signals graded against what AI engines actually pick up. Not a 2018-era SEO checklist.
  4. 04
    A 90-day roadmap, phased and prioritized. Yours to keep. Execute in-house, hand it to your current agency, or hand it to us. Not a 90-page PDF nobody reads.
  5. 05
    Honest answers. Delivered in 48 hours. If the audit says you don't need ongoing work, we tell you.
Book my audit
Most teams start here
§01 / Tier IFeatured

Signal

For teams ready to be cited.

$2,000/mo · 3-month minimum
  1. 01
    Weekly citation tracking across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude. Three of the four are web-grounded so you see what AI is citing this week, not what it was trained on a year ago. Reddit threads break out separately because that's where AI pulls "best X for Y" answers from. A keyword-by-competitor matrix shows who gets cited for what. Green where you win. Red where you don't.
  2. 02
    Schema fixes that ship to your live site without dev work. One snippet pasted in your site's head once. Every improvement pushes within an hour, but only after our quality grader confirms the schema is complete — partial schema costs 18 percentage points of citation share. No CMS access needed.
  3. 03
    A live dashboard that refreshes every Monday. AEO score, projected ceiling, citation share, GSC clicks, and how you rank against your industry's peer group. Movement over time, not a one-time snapshot.
  4. 04
    A 90-day roadmap that updates itself. Items auto-complete as fixes land. Every 90 days, drift detection runs against your citation history and surfaces new competitors, lost ground, and emerging gaps before they show up in your numbers. The plan is always current.
  5. 05
    Authority signals you'd never check manually. Trust-platform presence (G2, Trustpilot, Capterra, Google Business), named-author coverage, and Person schema completeness. AI engines look at all of these when deciding who to cite. We surface the gaps and add them to your roadmap automatically.
  6. 06
    A Monday digest you can forward. What changed last week, the one thing that mattered most, and the recommended next move. Plain English. No PDF theatre.
Start Signal
§02 / Tier IIFull cover

Amplify

For teams ready to ship the work, not just see what's needed.

$4,500/mo · everything in Signal, plus:
  1. 01
    Brand voice trained on your existing writing. Paste samples or point us at a URL. Future drafts inherit the fingerprint automatically. Founder edits drop from 60% to 5%.
  2. 02
    Citation-shaped content drafted in your voice. When the dashboard surfaces a gap, our pipeline drafts the page. Service pages, FAQ entries, pillar articles, structured menu pages -- whatever your business actually publishes. You approve before it ships.
  3. 03
    Auto-publish to WordPress, Webflow, or Shopify. Approved drafts push directly to your CMS on their scheduled date. On Squarespace, Wix, or custom platforms, drafts arrive ready-to-paste with HTML, meta description, and schema.
  4. 04
    A content calendar that fills itself. Drafts queue against the roadmap so you always know what's shipping next. No planning meeting. No content audit.
  5. 05
    The full loop, closed. Most agencies stop at the report. Amplify finishes the loop: gap surfaced → draft generated → reviewed → published. Without you assembling a content team.
Start Amplify
§01 The Problem 04 / cells

The blue link era is over.

Your current agency is still optimizing for a page of results nobody looks at. The traffic you used to own is being answered by a model instead. This is the shape of what replaced it.

§ The Recommendation Gap
1.2%

Your competitors are already in the answer.

Every day, AI names them to your buyers. And not you.

Bain & Co. · BrightEdge · 2024

§01 / Google

AI Overviews

The AI answers the question and keeps the click. Informational traffic on the queries you used to own is down 34 to 60 percent. Your rankings didn't change. Your visibility did.

Zero-click rate — 58.5%
§02 / Chat

ChatGPT, Claude & Gemini

The new front page of the internet, and your site isn't on it. ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Perplexity don't crawl. They cite. They pick sources from a much shorter list, and that list is being written right now.

Combined monthly users — 1B+
§03 / Stack

Technical Debt

Schema written in 2018. Meta descriptions written for robots that no longer read them. An architecture built for the crawler era, at the exact moment the crawler era stopped mattering.

Legacy schema coverage — 12%
§04 / Agency

The Agency Trap

Your current agency is still selling rankings on a SERP nobody reads. They'll tell you AEO is coming. It's not coming. It's here. It was here last year. The playbook they sold you no longer works.

Still selling keyword reports — 97%
§02 Proof of Practice 01 / case

We built our
own AI-native
product.

Never Ranked ships its own software. Montaic is an AI-native listing generator we built for real estate professionals. It's a real product with real users, and it's also our lab. Every AEO technique we recommend to clients gets stress-tested on Montaic first.

We don't pitch what we haven't tried. When you hire us, you're hiring the team that runs the experiment on their own software before they run it on yours.

In-house / SaaS LIVE
Montaic

AI-drafted MLS descriptions, social captions, and fact sheets for real estate agents and commercial brokers.

Visit montaic.com

§03 Services 06 / tracks

Monitoring tools show you're invisible. We make you visible.

Six tracks built for AI citation. One system.

Every track runs on a deliberate split of automation and human judgment. The percentage is not marketing. It's the part we let the machine handle so we spend our hours on the part it can't.

§01 / AUDIT 85% Auto

Audit + 90-day roadmap

Full technical, content, and citation audit. Delivered in forty-eight hours. No ninety-page PDFs nobody opens.

Automation85%
§02 / CONTENT 70% Auto

Citation-shaped content, in your voice

AI-drafted pieces built for citation. Brand voice trained on your existing work. Human-reviewed before delivery. Your voice, their speed.

Automation70%
§03 / SCHEMA 95% Auto

Schema that auto-deploys

Structured data that tells the model what you are, who you serve, and why you're credible. Generated, pushed to your live site, and monitored.

Automation95%
§04 / KEYWORDS 90% Auto

Keywords AI engines actually cite

Intent mapping across classic SERPs, AI Overviews, and generative answer engines. Three different games. Three different strategies.

Automation90%
§05 / CITATIONS 95% Auto

Weekly tracking across 4 engines

Live web-grounded citation runs across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini, plus a tracking pass on Claude. Yours and theirs. Share of answer, quote fidelity, sentiment.

Automation95%
§06 / REPORT 100% Auto

Live dashboard, refreshed Monday

Score, citation share, GSC clicks, and projected ceiling in one tab. Refreshed every Monday at 6am UTC. Not a monthly PDF nobody opens.

Automation100%
§04 How We Work 04 / rules

Four rules.
No exceptions.

We built this agency around the operating model we wanted for ourselves. No standing meetings. No Slack channels. No monthly PDF theatre. Your calendar stays clean, the work stays visible.

§01

Async first.

No standing calls. No weekly syncs. No "got a sec" interruptions. Everything is written, recorded, or on the dashboard. Your calendar stays yours.

§02

The dashboard is the meeting.

Refreshed every Monday. Always accessible. Classic rankings, AI citations, and share of answer in one place. If you want to know something, you open the tab.

§03

Loom recaps, not calls.

The founder records a monthly video walking through what changed, what mattered, and what we recommend. Watch it when you want. Rewatch it whenever.

§04

Email SLAs, kept honestly.

Twelve business hours on email. We answer fast because we're not in meetings. If we miss it, we tell you why.

Competitor check · 30 seconds

See who ChatGPT cites instead of you.

Drop a competitor's domain. We'll grade their AEO readiness and show you where they're winning. The gaps are the opening.

https://
AEO score

§04.1 The Dashboard your tab, always open

Not a PDF. A product.

Every client gets a live dashboard at app.neverranked.com. AEO scores, citation tracking, competitor gaps, Search Console data, and a roadmap that auto-generates from your scan results. Not a report you forget to open. A product you check because the data matters.

Example view · Refreshed every Monday · 30+ AEO signals tracked View live demo →
↻
Weekly AEO scans
Every Monday your site is re-scanned across 30+ AEO signals. Score history, trend charts, and week-over-week deltas. Movement over time, not a single snapshot.
▲
Score projection
See where your AEO score is headed based on remaining roadmap items. The dashboard estimates your projected ceiling so you know the gap between now and full optimization.
✓
AI citation tracking
Weekly citation runs across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews. See which queries cite you, which cite competitors, and your share of answer over time.
▦
Competitor citation matrix
A keyword-by-competitor grid showing exactly who gets cited where. Green where you win. Red where you don't. The gaps are the opportunity.
◆
Auto-generated roadmap
When your domain is added, a phased roadmap generates automatically from scan results. Foundation, Growth, Dominance. Items auto-complete as improvements land.
☰
Monthly reports
Score deltas, red flags resolved, schema changes, roadmap progress, citation movement, and GSC trends. One page. Emailable. Printable. No PDF theatre.
☌
Search console integration
Google Search Console data pulled directly into the dashboard. Clicks, impressions, CTR, and average position alongside your AEO metrics in one view.
⚙
Content gap analysis
Surfaces topics your competitors get cited for and you don't. Grouped by category with the competitor names attached. Your next content calendar writes itself.
✉
Alerts & weekly digest
Score regressions trigger instant alerts. Every Monday a digest lands in your inbox: score, citation share, GSC clicks, roadmap progress. Forward it to your board.
§ The difference tools vs us

Most AEO tools tell you what's broken. We ship the fix.

Every other AEO tool ends at the dashboard. They flag the missing schema. They list the content gaps. They show the citation deficit. Then they hand the work back to you.

Our snippet pastes into your site once. From then on, every schema fix we generate pushes to your live site within an hour. No CMS access. No dev tickets. No copy-paste. The audit becomes a roadmap. The roadmap becomes shipped code. The shipped code earns citations.

"Other agencies still send PDFs. We push patches."

< 1hr
From fix generated to live on your site
0
Dev tickets you have to file
3
Supported CMSes for content auto-publish (Amplify)
§04.2 The Experience what it feels like

From scan day to cited.

You don't learn the dashboard. You open a tab and the data is already there. Here is what the first 30 days look like from the inside.

See the live demo
Day 1

We scan. A roadmap writes itself.

Your domain is added and scanned across 30+ AEO signals. A phased roadmap generates automatically from the results. No kickoff meeting. No onboarding deck.

Week 1

You see the full picture.

AEO score, citation share, competitor gaps, Search Console data, and content opportunities. Everything in one tab. Refreshed every Monday.

Every Monday

A digest lands in your inbox.

Score, citation movement, GSC clicks, roadmap progress, and the one thing that matters most this week. Plain English. Forward it to whoever needs to know.

Monthly

A report you'd actually send upward.

Score delta, red flags resolved, schema changes, competitor movement, and GSC trends. One page. Printable. Emailable. Built so your boss reads it.

§04.3 The Math your industry, your numbers

How many new customers pay for a full year?

45% of consumers now use AI to find services. But AI only recommends 1.2% of businesses. Pick your industry and see how many new customers it takes to cover Signal for a full year ($24,000).

One new customer
Monthly cost
$2,000/mo
See your score free Start with the $500 audit

Industry value estimates are derived from the following published sources. Adjust above for your real number.

  • Med Spa: American Med Spa Association, 2024 State of the Medical Spa Industry Report — avg $504 per patient visit. Source.
  • Dentist: ADA Health Policy Institute, National Dental Expenditures, 2024. Source.
  • Personal Injury Law: CasePeer, Personal Injury Settlement Amount Examples 2025 — avg settlements $24K–$55K, 33% contingency. Source.
  • Family Law: Nolo, How Much Will My Divorce Cost? — avg attorney fees $11,300. Source.
  • Real Estate: RealEstateWitch / RealTrends commission data, 2024. NAR does not set commissions. Source.
  • Roofing: Angi, How Much Does Roof Replacement Cost? 2024–2025 Data — national avg $9,540. Source.
  • HVAC: HomeAdvisor, HVAC Installation Cost Guide, 2024 — avg replacement $7,500. Source.
  • Restaurant: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics, Consumer Expenditures — 2024 — food away from home $3,945/yr per household. Source.
  • Financial Advisor: Kitces.com, Independent Financial Advisor Fee Comparison, 2024 — median advisor fee 1% AUM. Source.
  • Chiropractic / PT: Journal of Manipulative and Physiological Therapeutics, 2024 utilization analysis — $677/yr per patient over 8.2 visits. Source.

All figures are national averages or industry-wide estimates current as of 2024–2025. Your real numbers will vary by region, practice mix, and customer profile — use the “Adjust assumptions” button to model your own.

§04.4 Fit who this is built for

Fit before price.

Before price. Before scope. Before a call. We'd rather lose the wrong client at the homepage than three months in.

§01

Built for

  • Clinics, med spas, and health practices where most new patients come from a local search.
  • Home services and trades with a service radius, not a national footprint.
  • Boutique agencies and studios where the founder is still the best salesperson.
  • Professional services where a Google or ChatGPT search is how most new clients find you.
§02

Not built for

  • Enterprise SaaS with an in-house SEO team. You already have this.
  • Anyone looking for a self-serve tool to run themselves. We're the team that does the work.
  • Businesses that want to wait six months to see movement. Our work ships weekly.
§05 Pricing 02 / tiers

Two ways to start.

Three-month minimum, then month-to-month. The price you see is the price you pay. No set-up fees, no onboarding tax, no annual contract you'll quietly resent.

The minimum exists because this work compounds. Month one builds the foundation. Month two surfaces signals. Month three is where citations start. Quitting before then is quitting before the return.

Concerned about giving us access to your site? Read exactly what we touch and what we don't →

§05.2 / FAQ

Questions we get before the first email.

Can I cancel anytime?

Yes, after the three-month minimum. We run month-to-month after that. No annual lock-in, no termination fee. If it isn't working, you leave.

Why the three-month minimum?

Because AEO compounds. Month one builds the foundation. Month two indexes. Month three is where citations start. Cancelling earlier means you paid for the setup and left before the return. The minimum protects you from that, not us.

What if the audit says I don't need you?

Then we tell you. The $500 audit is yours to keep whether you hire us after or not. We'd rather lose a retainer than sell work you don't need.

Do you guarantee citations?

No. Anyone who guarantees AI citations in week one is either lying or selling ads. We guarantee the work: audit, schema, content, monitoring, and honest reporting. The citations follow the work.

What if I already have an agency?

Keep them. Most agencies do classic SEO well but don't know AEO yet. Hand them our roadmap and let them execute. We work with agencies regularly. It's how most engagements start. Or if you are an agency and want to offer AEO yourself, see the reseller brief.

How is this different from regular SEO?

Regular SEO optimizes for Google's ten blue links. AEO optimizes for what ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google's AI Overviews actually cite when someone asks a question. The signals overlap, but the work is different. The long version is here.

Why not just use Ahrefs or Semrush?

Use them. We do, internally. Ahrefs and Semrush are tools that flag what's broken on your site and what your competitors are winning. They're great at that. They don't fix anything. After the report, you still have to write the schema, deploy it, draft the content, ship the pages, and maintain the calendar yourself. If your team has the bandwidth to execute a 30-page audit every month, an AEO tool subscription is the right call. If they don't, that's why we exist. Same data layer, plus the team that ships the work and a pipeline that auto-publishes to your CMS.

Do you work with businesses outside the US?

Yes. The work is the same. The only difference is the email SLA clock runs on US business hours (Eastern).

§05.1 Timeline honest

This is infrastructure,
not advertising.

Ads stop when you stop paying. AEO compounds. The schema, content, and structured data you build today trains the model that cites you six months from now. Here is what that actually looks like.

Month 1 / Foundation

Build the signal layer

Technical audit. Schema deployed. Entity registration. Structured data across every critical page. The model can now read your site the way it reads Wikipedia.

Month 2 / Indexing

Signals surface

Content indexed. Citation tracking goes live. You start appearing in edge queries. The dashboard shows movement. AI models are learning your entity. Not citing yet. Learning.

Month 3+ / Compounding

Citations begin

First verifiable citations. Share of answer climbs. Each new piece of content reinforces the last. This is where the curve bends. Every month after this compounds on everything before it.

Why we're honest about this: Agencies that promise results in week one are either lying or selling ads. We build the pipes, not the water. The three-month minimum exists because it takes that long for AI models to absorb, retrain, and begin citing your data consistently. After month three, every additional month compounds on the foundation already in place. Stopping resets the curve.

§06 The $500 Audit

Before you hire anyone,
see what's broken.

§ Status

Paced deliberately. Next available: May 2026.

Five hundred dollars. Paid once. A full technical and content audit across classic SEO and AEO, plus a ninety-day roadmap you can execute in-house, hand to your current agency, or hand to us. Whichever makes sense after you read it.

  • Technical Audit
  • Schema Review
  • Keyword Gap Analysis
  • AI Citation Audit
  • Competitor Teardown
  • 90-Day Roadmap

Six deliverables. Forty-eight hours. Yours to keep whether you hire us after or not. We don't refund. We deliver.

The roadmap is a ninety-day plan because that is how long the foundation takes. We will not promise you citations in week one. We will show you exactly what to build and when to expect returns.
